{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040228CAE5B092BBFD65F70F87"}"},"total":1039},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7462054895664988952","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"3000小时读者境评价一下：整体上还行，评分低了点，8.5到8.8差不多，大毒没有小毒也没有，就是有一些不合理的地方，当然你无脑过去也行，对我来说已经算小瑕疵了。呃，前面分析旁白确实有点多，但是后面有改善，作者，也是在努力的，多写一点剧情，推动可以再快一点，境界不要压的这么死，可以爆发一下嘛。                                                     总结：还不错，没书的或者新手可以追一下（老书虫可以一试），缺点就是字太少了，我没发力，就看的差不多了，先养一下，作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1737407081,"group_id":"7442637144864066622","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大风起兮云飞扬，东风起兮平西方！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9GBNCz+Fdlybx632if7xWPEeo5Qh7Wi6NcsJXIQFc6t","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c278fa94243744049580b424f50cea8e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789097&x-signature=eKHLq9bdBZA0bHRxVVEbCsTbxUM%3D","user_id":"3641170650210462","user_name":"神农裔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3641170650210462","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774656473,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7442637144864066622","book_info":{"abstract":"叶无极穿越到天玄大陆，获得最强分身系统，只要创造分身，提升分身的影响力就能不断变强，
于是，叶无极的分身开始在天玄大陆不断的搞事情。
垂垂老矣的老年散修武尊，寿元将近，无亲无故，Buff叠满，威慑力瞬间封顶。
神秘的周家公子，身边天骄无数，强者如云，仿佛拥有着无比强大的背景，让人望而生畏。
除此之外，还有天赋无比强横的炼丹师，作为大帝子嗣的纯血真龙，
天机术高深莫测，无所不知的天机阁主，
实力足以与周家并驾齐驱的夜家等等多方强者接连亮相，
漫长岁月之后，在无数分身的影响之下，天玄大陆早已成为等级最高的世界，叶无极的分身们也都成为了顶级的强者，
而作为幕后黑手的叶无极，也借助众多分身的力量，成为了诸天最强。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e78b7198740d4134ca233842cc7860c7","author":"八方雷动","author_id":"","book_id":"7442637144864066622","book_name":"帝族公子？隐世老怪？都是我分身","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#909898","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7442637246873748030","read_count":"14795","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"978600"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"505","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,开局,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a16a69f501f9c3dafd141fbc0533833c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393748&x-signature=weRmfFMvuGFmdc1TGFrEWbrIxZY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"792100115065772","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"130"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040228CAE5B092BBFD65F70F87"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":27,"forwarded_count":0," 讲解很细，每个都能细致讲解这个什么用有什么功能作用，然后怎么配合，我觉得看着能看明白这些技能的使用和代入，可能别人看上去就有点水，我感觉还可以，就是我觉得逼格高的人自言自语太多有点降格[害羞][害羞][害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1738430920,"group_id":"7442637144864066622","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我有妄想症，你也有妄想症吗？","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0uhheQ4Zmvyr6A0y3IdORQ=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/82fc035bb54e4d6190969e75152d30b3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793435&x-signature=MinIshI0VWd3RT2CPn0A5WoZDcQ%3D","user_id":"827311215876525","user_name":"爱吃竹笋炒肉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"827311215876525","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7442637144864066622","book_info":{"abstract":"叶无极穿越到天玄大陆，获得最强分身系统，只要创造分身，提升分身的影响力就能不断变强，
